
注意：以下代码为简化版，实际生产环境需要更完善的错误处理、配置管理和性能优化。

1. 多模态解析器 (src/multimodal/)
src/multimodal/mod.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
pub mod image;
pub mod audio;
pub mod video;
pub mod gis;

use crate::models::{MultimodalContent, MemoryType};
use std::path::Path;

pub trait MultimodalParser {
    fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>>;
}

pub struct ParserRegistry {
    parsers: Vec<Box<dyn MultimodalParser + Send + Sync>>,
}

impl ParserRegistry {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        let mut parsers = Vec::new();
        parsers.push(Box::new(image::ImageParser));
        parsers.push(Box::new(audio::AudioParser));
        parsers.push(Box::new(video::VideoParser));
        parsers.push(Box::new(gis::GisParser));
        Self { parsers }
    }

    pub fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
        for parser in &self.parsers {
            if parser.can_parse(path) {
                return parser.parse(path);
            }
        }
        Err(Box::new(std::io::Error::new(
            std::io::ErrorKind::Unsupported,
            "Unsupported file type",
        )))
    }
}
src/multimodal/image.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{MultimodalContent, MemoryType};
use image::GenericImageView;
use std::path::Path;

pub struct ImageParser;

impl super::MultimodalParser for ImageParser {
    fn can_parse(&self, path: &Path) -> bool {
        matches!(
            path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()),
            Some("jpg" | "jpeg" | "png" | "gif" | "webp" | "bmp" | "tiff")
        )
    }

    fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
        let img = image::open(path)?;
        let (width, height) = img.dimensions();
        let data = std::fs::read(path)?;
        let mime = mime_guess::from_path(path).first_or_octet_stream().to_string();

        Ok(MultimodalContent {
            modality: MemoryType::Image,
            data: Some(data),
            path: Some(path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),
            mime_type: Some(mime),
            metadata: {
                let mut meta = std::collections::HashMap::new();
                meta.insert("width".to_string(), serde_json::json!(width));
                meta.insert("height".to_string(), serde_json::json!(height));
                meta
            },
        })
    }
}

use crate::models::{MultimodalContent, MemoryType};
use std::path::Path;

pub struct AudioParser;

impl super::MultimodalParser for AudioParser {
    fn can_parse(&self, path: &Path) -> bool {
        matches!(
            path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()),
            Some("mp3" | "wav" | "flac" | "aac" | "ogg" | "m4a")
        )
    }

    fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
        let data = std::fs::read(path)?;
        let mime = mime_guess::from_path(path).first_or_octet_stream().to_string();

        // 使用rodio或ffmpeg提取音频元数据（如时长、采样率）
        // 这里简化，只读取文件
        Ok(MultimodalContent {
            modality: MemoryType::Audio,
            data: Some(data),
            path: Some(path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),
            mime_type: Some(mime),
            metadata: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
        })
    }
}

        matches!(
            path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()),
            Some("mp4" | "avi" | "mov" | "mkv" | "webm")
        )
    }

    fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {

        // 使用ffmpeg提取视频元数据（时长、分辨率等）

            modality: MemoryType::Video,
            data: Some(data),
            path: Some(path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),

            metadata: std::collections::HashMap::new(),

use crate::models::{MultimodalContent, MemoryType};
use std::path::Path;

pub struct GisParser;

impl super::MultimodalParser for GisParser {
    fn can_parse(&self, path: &Path) -> bool {
        matches!(
            path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()),
            Some("geotiff" | "tif" | "tiff" | "shp" | "geojson" | "kml" | "kmz")
        )
    }

    fn parse(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<MultimodalContent, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
        let data = std::fs::read(path)?;
        let mime = mime_guess::from_path(path).first_or_octet_stream().to_string();

        // 使用GDAL解析GIS文件，提取元数据（边界框、坐标系、要素数量等）
        // 这里简化，只读取文件
        Ok(MultimodalContent {
            modality: MemoryType::Gis,
            data: Some(data),
            path: Some(path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),
            mime_type: Some(mime),
            metadata: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
        })
    }
}
2. 嵌入模型集成 (src/embedding.rs)
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::Memory;
use anyhow::Result;
use ort::Environment;
use std::sync::Arc;

pub struct EmbeddingModel {
    session: ort::Session,
    tokenizer: Option<tokenizers::Tokenizer>, // 可选，用于文本分词
}

impl EmbeddingModel {
    pub fn new(model_path: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let env = Environment::builder()
            .with_name("hyperrag")
            .build()?;
        let session = env
            .new_builder()?
            .with_model_from_file(model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            session,
            tokenizer: None,
        })
    }

    pub fn embed_text(&self, text: &str) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 1. 分词（如果有tokenizer）
        let tokens = if let Some(tok) = &self.tokenizer {
            let encoding = tok.encode(text, true).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;
            encoding.get_ids().to_vec()
        } else {
            // 简单按空格分词（实际应使用更复杂的分词）
            text.split_whitespace().map(|s| s.len() as u32).collect()
        };

        // 2. 构建输入tensor
        let input_tensor = ort::value::Tensor::from_array(
            ndarray::Array2::from_shape_vec((1, tokens.len()), tokens)?,
            &[1, tokens.len() as i64],
        )?;

        // 3. 运行推理
        let outputs = self.session.run(vec![input_tensor.into()])?;
        let embedding = outputs[0]
            .try_extract::<f32>()?
            .to_owned()
            .into_dimensionality::<ndarray::Ix1>()?
            .to_vec();

        // 4. L2归一化
        let norm: f32 = embedding.iter().map(|x| x * x).sum::<f32>().sqrt().max(1e-5);
        Ok(embedding.into_iter().map(|x| x / norm).collect())
    }

    pub fn embed_image(&self, image_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 使用CLIP等视觉模型
        // 这里简化，返回随机向量
        Ok(vec![0.1; 512])
    }

    pub fn embed_audio(&self, audio_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 使用音频模型
        Ok(vec![0.1; 512])
    }

    pub fn embed_video(&self, video_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 使用视频模型
        Ok(vec![0.1; 512])
    }

    pub fn embed_gis(&self, gis_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 使用GIS特征提取模型
        Ok(vec![0.1; 512])
    }
}

// 全局嵌入模型实例（懒加载）
lazy_static::lazy_static! {
    pub static ref EMBEDDING_MODEL: Arc<EmbeddingModel> = Arc::new(
        EmbeddingModel::new("models/bge-m3.onnx").expect("Failed to load embedding model")
    );
}
3. 存储层具体实现 (src/storage/)
src/storage/mod.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
pub mod postgres;
pub mod elasticsearch;
pub mod neo4j;
pub mod redis_storage;
pub mod local;

use crate::models::{Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;

pub trait StorageBackend {
    async fn append_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()>;
    async fn search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>>;
    async fn get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Memory>>;
}

pub struct CompositeStorage {
    postgres: postgres::PostgresStorage,
    elasticsearch: elasticsearch::EsStorage,
    neo4j: neo4j::Neo4jStorage,
    redis: redis_storage::RedisStorage,
    local: local::LocalStorage,
}

impl CompositeStorage {
    pub fn new(config: &crate::config::Config) -> Result<Self> {
        Ok(Self {
            postgres: postgres::PostgresStorage::new(&config.storage.postgres_url)?,
            elasticsearch: elasticsearch::EsStorage::new(&config.storage.elasticsearch_url)?,
            neo4j: neo4j::Neo4jStorage::new(
                &config.storage.neo4j_url,
                &config.storage.neo4j_user,
                &config.storage.neo4j_password,
            )?,
            redis: redis_storage::RedisStorage::new(&config.storage.redis_url)?,
            local: local::LocalStorage::new(&config.storage.rustfs_root),
        })
    }
}

impl StorageBackend for CompositeStorage {
    async fn append_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        // 并行写入所有存储
        let futures = vec![
            self.postgres.append_memory(memory),
            self.elasticsearch.index_memory(memory),
            self.neo4j.insert_hypergraph(memory),
            self.redis.cache_memory(memory),
            self.local.append_memory(memory),
        ];
        futures::future::join_all(futures).await;
        Ok(())
    }

    async fn search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 六路并行检索
        let (bm25, vector, graph, spatial_temporal, multimodal) = futures::join!(
            self.elasticsearch.bm25_search(query),
            self.postgres.vector_search(query),
            self.neo4j.graph_traversal(query),
            self.redis.spatial_temporal_search(query),
            self.multimodal_rerank(query)
        ).await;

        // 融合结果
        self.fuse_results(bm25?, vector?, graph?, spatial_temporal?, multimodal?, query)
            .await
    }

    async fn get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Memory>> {
        // 优先从Redis获取，否则从PostgreSQL获取
        if let Some(mem) = self.redis.get_memory(id).await? {
            return Ok(Some(mem));
        }
        self.postgres.get_memory(id).await
    }
}
src/storage/postgres.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use sqlx::{postgres::PgPool, Row};

pub struct PostgresStorage {
    pool: PgPool,
}

impl PostgresStorage {
    pub fn new(url: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let pool = PgPool::connect(url).await?;
        Ok(Self { pool })
    }

    pub async fn append_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        // 插入到documents表
        sqlx::query!(
            "INSERT INTO documents (id, content, embedding, created_at, metadata) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)",
            memory.id,
            memory.content,
            memory.embedding.as_deref().unwrap_or(&[]),
            memory.created_at,
            serde_json::to_value(&memory.metadata)?
        )
        .execute(&self.pool)
        .await?;
        Ok(())
    }

    pub async fn vector_search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 使用pgvector进行向量相似度搜索
        // 这里简化，返回空
        Ok(vec![])
    }

    pub async fn get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Memory>> {
        let row = sqlx::query!("SELECT * FROM documents WHERE id = $1", id)
            .fetch_optional(&self.pool)
            .await?;
        Ok(row.map(|r| Memory {
            id: r.id,
            content: r.content,
            embedding: r.embedding.map(|v| v.to_vec()),
            spatial: None,
            temporal: None,
            multimodal: None,
            hyper_nodes: vec![],
            hyper_edges: vec![],
            metadata: r.metadata.unwrap_or_default(),
            created_at: r.created_at,
            updated_at: r.updated_at,
        }))
    }
}
src/storage/elasticsearch.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use elasticsearch::{Elasticsearch, SearchParts};
use serde_json::json;

pub struct EsStorage {
    client: Elasticsearch,
    index_name: String,
}

impl EsStorage {
    pub fn new(url: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let client = Elasticsearch::default();
        Ok(Self {
            client,
            index_name: "memories".to_string(),
        })
    }

    pub async fn index_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        self.client
            .index(elasticsearch::IndexParts::IndexId(&self.index_name, &memory.id))
            .body(json!({
                "content": memory.content,
                "created_at": memory.created_at,
                "metadata": memory.metadata,
            }))
            .send()
            .await?;
        Ok(())
    }

    pub async fn bm25_search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let response = self.client
            .search(SearchParts::Index(&self.index_name))
            .body(json!({
                "query": {
                    "match": {
                        "content": query.text.as_deref().unwrap_or("")
                    }
                },
                "size": query.top_k
            }))
            .send()
            .await?;

        // 解析响应
        let results: Vec<SearchResult> = serde_json::from_value(response.json()?)?;
        Ok(results)
    }
}
src/storage/neo4j.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, NodeType};
use anyhow::Result;
use neo4rs::{Graph, Node, Relation, query};

pub struct Neo4jStorage {
    graph: Graph,
}

impl Neo4jStorage {
    pub fn new(url: &str, user: &str, password: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let graph = Graph::new(url, user, password)?;
        Ok(Self { graph })
    }

    pub async fn insert_hypergraph(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        // 1. 创建记忆节点
        let memory_node = Node::new("Memory")
            .with("id", &memory.id)
            .with("content", &memory.content);
        self.graph.run(memory_node.create()).await?;

        // 2. 创建超图节点和边
        for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
            let node_node = Node::new(match node.node_type {
                NodeType::Memory => "Memory",
                NodeType::Entity => "Entity",
                NodeType::Location => "Location",
                NodeType::Time => "Time",
                NodeType::Concept => "Concept",
                NodeType::Media => "Media",
                NodeType::GisFeature => "GisFeature",
            })
            .with("id", &node.id)
            .with("properties", serde_json::to_value(&node.properties)?);
            self.graph.run(node_node.create()).await?;

            // 创建关系
            let rel = Relation::new("PART_OF")
                .from(&node.id)
                .to(&memory.id);
            self.graph.run(rel.create()).await?;
        }

        // 3. 创建超边（n-ary关系）
        for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
            // 创建超边节点
            let edge_node = Node::new("HyperEdge")
                .with("id", &edge.id)
                .with("weight", edge.weight);
            self.graph.run(edge_node.create()).await?;

            // 连接所有节点到超边
            for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                let rel = Relation::new("CONNECTED_TO")
                    .from(node_id)
                    .to(&edge.id);
                self.graph.run(rel.create()).await?;
            }
        }

        Ok(())
    }

    pub async fn graph_traversal(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 实现超图遍历算法（PPR、BFS等）
        // 这里简化，返回空
        Ok(vec![])
    }
}
src/storage/redis_storage.rs
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use redis::AsyncCommands;

pub struct RedisStorage {
    client: redis::Client,
}

impl RedisStorage {
    pub fn new(url: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let client = redis::Client::open(url)?;
        Ok(Self { client })
    }

    pub async fn cache_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        let mut con = self.client.get_multiplexed_async_connection().await?;
        con.set_ex(
            &format!("memory:{}", memory.id),
            serde_json::to_string(memory)?,
            3600,
        ).await?;
        Ok(())
    }

    pub async fn get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Memory>> {
        let mut con = self.client.get_multiplexed_async_connection().await?;
        let data: Option<String> = con.get(&format!("memory:{}", id)).await?;
        Ok(data.and_then(|d| serde_json::from_str(&d).ok()))
    }

    pub async fn spatial_temporal_search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 使用Redis GEO和ZSET进行时空过滤
        // 这里简化，返回空
        Ok(vec![])
    }
}

use crate::models::Memory;
use anyhow::Result;
use std::fs::OpenOptions;
use std::io::Write;
use std::path::Path;

pub struct LocalStorage {
    root: String,
}

impl LocalStorage {
    pub fn new(root: &str) -> Self {
        Self {
            root: root.to_string(),
        }
    }

    pub fn append_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        let file_path = format!("{}/memories.jsonl", self.root);
        let mut file = OpenOptions::new()
            .create(true)
            .append(true)
            .open(&file_path)?;
        writeln!(file, "{}", serde_json::to_string(memory)?)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}
4. 超图遍历算法 (src/hypergraph.rs)
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>, // node_id -> [edge_ids]
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>, // node_id -> [edge_ids]
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    /// Personalized PageRank (PPR) 遍历
    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                // 随机游走概率
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                // 通过超边扩散
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            // 计算变化量
            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    /// 基于时空约束的图遍历
    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                // 检查时空约束（这里需要节点有时空属性）
                // 简化：只遍历连接节点
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    /// 查找相关记忆（基于超图关联）
    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::models::{Memory, MultimodalContent, SpatialEntity, TemporalEntity};
use crate::multimodal::ParserRegistry;
use anyhow::Result;
use chrono::{DateTime, Utc};
use std::path::Path;

pub struct UniversalExtractor {
    parser_registry: ParserRegistry,
    // ... 其他字段
}

impl UniversalExtractor {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            parser_registry: ParserRegistry::new(),
            // ... 其他初始化
        }
    }

    pub fn extract(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&Path>) -> Result<(Memory, Vec<HyperNode>, Vec<HyperEdge>)> {
        // ... 之前的提取逻辑

        // 多模态解析
        let multimodal = if let Some(path) = file_path {
            self.parser_registry.parse(path).ok()
        } else {
            None
        };

        // 构建记忆（包含多模态内容）
        let memory = Memory {
            id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
            content: text_content.clone(),
            multimodal,
            spatial: spatial.clone(),
            temporal: temporal.clone(),
            hyper_nodes: Vec::new(),
            hyper_edges: Vec::new(),
            embedding: None,
            metadata: {
                let mut meta = std::collections::HashMap::new();
                meta.insert("language".to_string(), serde_json::json!(language));
                meta
            },
            created_at: Utc::now(),
            updated_at: Utc::now(),
        };

        // ... 构建超图
        Ok((memory, nodes, edges))
    }
}

use crate::models::Memory;
use crate::storage::{CompositeStorage, StorageBackend};
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct Storage {
    inner: CompositeStorage,
}

impl Storage {
    pub fn new(config: &crate::config::Config) -> Result<Self> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: CompositeStorage::new(config)?,
        })
    }

    pub async fn append_memory(&self, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        self.inner.append_memory(memory).await
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        self.inner.search(query).await
    }

    pub async fn get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Memory>> {
        self.inner.get_memory(id).await
    }
}
7. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 1. 多路召回
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        // 2. 超图遍历增强（如果查询包含实体）
        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            // 提取查询实体，然后进行超图遍历
            // 这里简化，直接使用查询文本作为起始节点
            let start_nodes = vec![text.clone()];
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(&start_nodes[0], 2);
                // 将相关记忆的得分提高
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2; // 提升权重
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 3. 排序和归一化
        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        // L2归一化
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
8. 更新 src/main.rs 以使用新模块
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use anyhow::Result;
use tracing_subscriber::prelude::*;
use hyper_rag_final::config::Config;
use hyper_rag_final::engine::RagEngine;
use hyper_rag_final::models::{SearchQuery, SpatialFilter, TemporalFilter, MemoryType};
use hyper_rag_final::multimodal::ParserRegistry;
use axum::{routing::post, Json, Router};
use std::sync::Arc;

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() -> Result<()> {
    tracing_subscriber::registry()
        .with(tracing_subscriber::EnvFilter::try_from_default_env()
            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "hyper_rag_final=debug".into()))
        .with(tracing_subscriber::fmt::layer())
        .init();

    tracing::info!("🚀 初始化 HyperRAG 引擎...");

    let config = Config::load()?;
    tracing::info!("部署级别: {:?}", config.level);

    let engine = Arc::new(RagEngine::init(config).await?);
    let parser_registry = Arc::new(ParserRegistry::new());

    let app = Router::new()
        .route("/api/v1/ingest", post({
            let engine = engine.clone();
            let parser_registry = parser_registry.clone();
            move |Json(payload): Json<serde_json::Value| async move {
                let input = payload["input"].as_str().unwrap_or("").to_string();
                let file_path = payload["file_path"].as_str().map(|s| std::path::Path::new(s));
                let id = engine.index(&input, file_path).await?;
                Ok::<_, anyhow::Error>(Json(json!({"id": id})))
            }
        }))
        .route("/api/v1/search", post({
            let engine = engine.clone();
            move |Json(query): Json<SearchQuery>| async move {
                let results = engine.query(query).await?;
                Ok::<_, anyhow::Error>(Json(results))
            }
        }))
        .route("/health", axum::routing::get(|| async { "OK" }));

    let addr = format!("0.0.0.0:{}", 3000).parse()?;
    tracing::info!("服务运行于 http://{}", addr);
    axum::Server::bind(&addr).serve(app.into_make_service()).await?;

    Ok(())
}

10. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        // 实现PPR算法
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        // 实现时空约束遍历
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        // 查找相关记忆
        unimplemented!()
    }
}

use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 1. 多路召回
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        // 2. 超图遍历增强
        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 3. 排序和归一化
        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

17. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]); // 初始化为空，后续动态更新
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        // 1. 提取信息（包括多模态）
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        // 2. 生成嵌入向量
        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        // 3. 存储
        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;

        // 4. 更新超图索引
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 1. 生成查询嵌入
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;

        // 2. 执行检索（包含超图增强）
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        // 3. 超图增强
        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        // 4. 排序和归一化
        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

19. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {

21. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

    pub clip_model_path: Option<String>,

    pub server: ServerConfig,

use crate::models::Memory;
use anyhow::Result;
use ort::Environment;
use std::sync::Arc;

pub struct EmbeddingModel {
    session: ort::Session,
}

impl EmbeddingModel {
    pub fn new(model_path: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let env = Environment::builder()
            .with_name("hyperrag")
            .build()?;
        let session = env
            .new_builder()?
            .with_model_from_file(model_path)?;
        Ok(Self { session })
    }

    pub fn embed(&self, text: &str) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 实现文本嵌入
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn embed_image(&self, image_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 实现图像嵌入
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn embed_audio(&self, audio_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 实现音频嵌入
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn embed_video(&self, video_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 实现视频嵌入
        unimplemented!()
    }

    pub fn embed_gis(&self, gis_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 实现GIS数据嵌入
        unimplemented!()
    }
}

use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

27. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();

                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
36. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
37. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

tokenizers = "0.14" # 可选

use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {

            .iter()

                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;

                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {

            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());

                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

        let mut result = HashSet::new();

        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }

use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
