103. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

107. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

# 工具

111. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
112. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
113. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {

        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());

                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

                        }
                    }
                }

                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;

                break;

                                }

use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

123. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
124. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

use anyhow::Result;

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }

                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

                        }

            }
        }

use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
132. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
133. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历

use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

135. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());

                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {

                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

                break;

    }

        &self,

        spatial_radius: f64,

    ) -> Vec<String> {

                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

    }

                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {

                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }

use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());

            }
        }

            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}
144. 更新 src/retrieval.rs 以使用超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct RetrievalEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraphTraversal>,
}

impl RetrievalEngine {
    pub fn new(storage: Storage) -> Self {
        Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph: None,
        }
    }

    pub async fn search(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let mut results = self.storage.multi_source_search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            if let Some(ref hg) = self.hypergraph {
                let related = hg.find_related_memories(text, 2);
                for result in &mut results {
                    if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                        result.score *= 1.2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
145. 更新 src/engine/enterprise.rs 以使用嵌入模型和超图遍历
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

147. 创建 src/hypergraph.rs（超图遍历算法）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()

            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {

            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {

                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::config::Config;

}

        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {

        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}
