use crate::models::{HyperEdge, HyperNode, Memory, SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};

pub struct HyperGraphTraversal {
    node_index: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edge_index: HashMap<String, HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
    node_edges: HashMap<String, Vec<String>>,
}

impl HyperGraphTraversal {
    pub fn new(memories: Vec<Memory>) -> Self {
        let mut node_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut edge_index = HashMap::new();
        let mut adjacency = HashMap::new();
        let mut node_edges = HashMap::new();

        for memory in &memories {
            for node in &memory.hyper_nodes {
                node_index.insert(node.id.clone(), node.clone());
            }
            for edge in &memory.hyper_edges {
                edge_index.insert(edge.id.clone(), edge.clone());
                for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
                    adjacency
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                    node_edges
                        .entry(node_id.clone())
                        .or_default()
                        .push(edge.id.clone());
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            node_index,
            edge_index,
            adjacency,
            node_edges,
        }
    }

    pub fn ppr(&self, start_nodes: Vec<&str>, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks: HashMap<String, f64> = start_nodes
            .iter()
            .map(|&id| (id.to_string(), 1.0 / start_nodes.len() as f64))
            .collect();

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();
            let mut delta = 0.0;

            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), (1.0 - alpha) * rank);

                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            let edge_weight = edge.weight as f64;
                            let num_nodes = edge.node_ids.len() as f64;
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if connected_node != node_id {
                                    let contrib = alpha * rank * edge_weight / num_nodes;
                                    *new_ranks.entry(connected_node.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += contrib;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            for (node_id, &new_rank) in &new_ranks {
                let old_rank = ranks.get(node_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                delta = (new_rank - old_rank).abs().max(delta);
            }

            ranks = new_ranks;
            if delta < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    pub fn spatio_temporal_traversal(
        &self,
        start_nodes: Vec<&str>,
        spatial_radius: f64,
        temporal_window: chrono::Duration,
    ) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        for &node_id in &start_nodes {
            queue.push_back(node_id.to_string());
            visited.insert(node_id.to_string());
        }

        while let Some(current) = queue.pop_front() {
            if let Some(node) = self.node_index.get(&current) {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(&current) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for neighbor in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !visited.contains(neighbor) {
                                    visited.insert(neighbor.clone());
                                    queue.push_back(neighbor.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        visited.into_iter().collect()
    }

    pub fn find_related_memories(&self, memory_id: &str, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut result = HashSet::new();
        let mut current_depth = 0;
        let mut frontier = vec![memory_id.to_string()];

        while current_depth < max_depth && !frontier.is_empty() {
            let mut next_frontier = Vec::new();
            for node_id in &frontier {
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.node_edges.get(node_id) {
                    for edge_id in edge_ids {
                        if let Some(edge) = self.edge_index.get(edge_id) {
                            for connected_node in &edge.node_ids {
                                if !result.contains(connected_node) && connected_node != node_id {
                                    result.insert(connected_node.clone());
                                    next_frontier.push(connected_node.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            frontier = next_frontier;
            current_depth += 1;
        }

        result.into_iter().collect()
    }
}

use crate::config::Config;
use crate::engine::RagEngine;
use crate::models::{SearchQuery, SearchResult};
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::hypergraph::HyperGraphTraversal;
use crate::embedding::EmbeddingModel;
use anyhow::Result;

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    hypergraph: HyperGraphTraversal,
    embedding_model: EmbeddingModel,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &Config) -> Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![]);
        let embedding_model = EmbeddingModel::new(&config.multimodal.embedding_model_path)?;
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            hypergraph,
            embedding_model,
        })
    }

    pub async fn index(&self, input: &str, file_path: Option<&std::path::Path>) -> Result<String> {
        let extractor = crate::extractor::UniversalExtractor::new();
        let (memory, nodes, edges) = extractor.extract(input, file_path)?;

        let embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&memory.content)?;
        let memory = Memory {
            embedding: Some(embedding),
            ..memory
        };

        self.storage.append_memory(&memory).await?;
        self.hypergraph = HyperGraphTraversal::new(vec![memory.clone()]);

        Ok(memory.id)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        let query_embedding = self.embedding_model.embed(&query.text.unwrap_or_default())?;
        let mut results = self.storage.search(&query).await?;

        if let Some(ref text) = query.text {
            let related = self.hypergraph.find_related_memories(text, 2);
            for result in &mut results {
                if related.contains(&result.memory.id) {
                    result.score *= 1.2;
                }
            }
        }

        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        let norm: f64 = results.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for r in &mut results {
            r.score /= norm;
        }

        Ok(results.into_iter().take(query.top_k).collect())
    }
}

🔗 src/hypergraph.rs - 超图算法实现
rust

查看全部
use crate::models::*;
use anyhow::Result;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet, VecDeque};
use std::f64::consts::E;

/// 超图结构（支持n-ary关系）
#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub struct HyperGraph {
    nodes: HashMap<String, HyperNode>,
    edges: Vec<HyperEdge>,
    adjacency: HashMap<String, HashSet<String>>, // 节点->边索引
    node_weights: HashMap<String, f64>, // 节点权重（用于PPR）
}

impl HyperGraph {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            nodes: HashMap::new(),
            edges: Vec::new(),
            adjacency: HashMap::new(),
            node_weights: HashMap::new(),
        }
    }

    /// 添加节点
    pub fn add_node(&mut self, node: HyperNode) {
        self.nodes.insert(node.id.clone(), node);
        self.adjacency.entry(node.id.clone()).or_default();
    }

    /// 添加超边（n-ary关系）
    pub fn add_edge(&mut self, edge: HyperEdge) -> Result<()> {
        if edge.node_ids.len() < 2 {
            return Err(anyhow::anyhow!("Hyperedge must connect at least 2 nodes"));
        }
        
        let edge_id = edge.id.clone();
        self.edges.push(edge);
        let edge_idx = self.edges.len() - 1;

        // 更新邻接关系
        for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
            self.adjacency.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().insert(edge_id.clone());
        }

        // 更新节点权重（基于度中心性）
        for node_id in &edge.node_ids {
            *self.node_weights.entry(node_id.clone()).or_insert(0.0) += 1.0;
        }

        Ok(())
    }

    /// 从记忆构建超图
    pub fn build_from_memory(&mut self, memory: &Memory) {
        // 添加记忆节点
        self.add_node(HyperNode {
            id: memory.id.clone(),
            node_type: NodeType::Memory,
            properties: {
                let mut p = HashMap::new();
                p.insert("content".to_string(), serde_json::json!(memory.content));
                p.insert("created_at".to_string(), serde_json::json!(memory.created_at));
                p
            },
        });

        // 添加时间节点
        if let Some(temporal) = &memory.temporal {
            let time_node_id = format!("time_{}", temporal.timestamp.timestamp());
            self.add_node(HyperNode {
                id: time_node_id.clone(),
                node_type: NodeType::Time,
                properties: {
                    let mut p = HashMap::new();
                    p.insert("timestamp".to_string(), serde_json::json!(temporal.timestamp));
                    p
                },
            });

            self.add_edge(HyperEdge {
                id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
                node_ids: vec![memory.id.clone(), time_node_id],
                edge_type: EdgeType::TemporalOrder,
                weight: 1.0,
                properties: HashMap::new(),
            }).unwrap();
        }

        // 添加空间节点
        if let Some(spatial) = &memory.spatial {
            let spatial_node_id = format!("spatial_{}_{}", 
                spatial.latitude.unwrap_or(0.0), 
                spatial.longitude.unwrap_or(0.0)
            );
            self.add_node(HyperNode {
                id: spatial_node_id.clone(),
                node_type: NodeType::Location,
                properties: {
                    let mut p = HashMap::new();
                    if let Some(lat) = spatial.latitude { p.insert("latitude".to_string(), serde_json::json!(lat)); }
                    if let Some(lon) = spatial.longitude { p.insert("longitude".to_string(), serde_json::json!(lon)); }
                    if let Some(h3) = &spatial.h3_index { p.insert("h3_index".to_string(), serde_json::json!(h3)); }
                    p
                },
            });

            self.add_edge(HyperEdge {
                id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
                node_ids: vec![memory.id.clone(), spatial_node_id],
                edge_type: EdgeType::SpatialProximity,
                weight: 1.0,
                properties: HashMap::new(),
            }).unwrap();
        }

        // 添加实体节点
        for (idx, entity) in memory.hyper_nodes.iter().enumerate() {
            if let NodeType::Entity = entity.node_type {
                self.add_node(entity.clone());
                self.add_edge(HyperEdge {
                    id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
                    node_ids: vec![memory.id.clone(), entity.id.clone()],
                    edge_type: EdgeType::Cooccurrence,
                    weight: 1.0,
                    properties: HashMap::new(),
                }).unwrap();
            }
        }
    }

    /// PPR遍历（Personalized PageRank）
    pub fn ppr_traversal(&self, start_node_id: &str, alpha: f64, max_iter: usize, tol: f64) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks = HashMap::new();
        let mut new_ranks = HashMap::new();

        // 初始化：起始节点权重为1，其他为0
        for (node_id, _) in &self.nodes {
            ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), if node_id == start_node_id { 1.0 } else { 0.0 });
        }

        for _ in 0..max_iter {
            // 重置新排名
            new_ranks.clear();
            for (node_id, _) in &self.nodes {
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), 0.0);
            }

            // 随机游走
            for (node_id, &rank) in &ranks {
                if rank < tol {
                    continue;
                }

                // 自环概率
                new_ranks.insert(node_id.clone(), new_ranks[node_id] + alpha * rank);

                // 通过超边扩散
                if let Some(edge_ids) = self.adjacency.get(node_id) {
                    let neighbor_nodes: HashSet<String> = edge_ids.iter()
                        .flat_map(|eid| self.edges.iter().find(|e| e.id == *eid))
                        .flat_map(|edge| edge.node_ids.iter().cloned())
                        .filter(|nid| nid != node_id)
                        .collect();

                    if !neighbor_nodes.is_empty() {
                        let shared_rank = (1.0 - alpha) * rank / neighbor_nodes.len() as f64;
                        for neighbor_id in neighbor_nodes {
                            *new_ranks.get_mut(&neighbor_id).unwrap() += shared_rank;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            // 检查收敛
            let max_diff = ranks.iter()
                .map(|(node_id, &old_rank)| (new_ranks[node_id] - old_rank).abs())
                .fold(0.0, f64::max);

            ranks = new_ranks.clone();
            if max_diff < tol {
                break;
            }
        }

        ranks
    }

    /// 验证Helly性质（超图满足Helly性质当且仅当每个极小相交子集有公共交集）
    pub fn verify_helly_property(&self) -> bool {
        // 简化实现：检查所有两两相交的超边是否有公共节点
        for (i, edge_i) in self.edges.iter().enumerate() {
            for (j, edge_j) in self.edges.iter().enumerate() {
                if i >= j { continue; }
                
                let intersection: HashSet<_> = edge_i.node_ids.iter()
                    .filter(|id| edge_j.node_ids.contains(id))
                    .collect();

                if !intersection.is_empty() {
                    // 检查是否存在第三个超边与i、j都相交但不与intersection相交
                    for edge_k in &self.edges {
                        if edge_k.id == edge_i.id || edge_k.id == edge_j.id {
                            continue;
                        }
                        
                        let intersect_i_k: HashSet<_> = edge_i.node_ids.iter()
                            .filter(|id| edge_k.node_ids.contains(id))
                            .collect();
                        let intersect_j_k: HashSet<_> = edge_j.node_ids.iter()
                            .filter(|id| edge_k.node_ids.contains(id))
                            .collect();
                        
                        if !intersect_i_k.is_empty() && !intersect_j_k.is_empty() {
                            let common_with_k: HashSet<_> = intersection.iter()
                                .filter(|id| edge_k.node_ids.contains(*id))
                                .collect();
                            
                            if common_with_k.is_empty() {
                                return false; // 违反Helly性质
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        true
    }

    /// 验证König性质（对偶超图是clutter且满足König性质）
    pub fn verify_konig_property(&self) -> bool {
        // 简化：检查超图是否是clutter（没有边包含于另一条边）
        for edge_i in &self.edges {
            for edge_j in &self.edges {
                if edge_i.id == edge_j.id { continue; }
                
                let is_subset = edge_i.node_ids.iter().all(|id| edge_j.node_ids.contains(id));
                if is_subset {
                    return false; // 不是clutter
                }
            }
        }
        true
    }

    /// 时空感知的PPR（融合时空门控）
    pub fn spatiotemporal_ppr(
        &self,
        start_node_id: &str,
        spatial_gate: f64,
        temporal_gate: f64,
        alpha: f64,
        max_iter: usize,
        tol: f64,
    ) -> HashMap<String, f64> {
        let mut ranks = self.ppr_traversal(start_node_id, alpha, max_iter, tol);
        
        // 应用时空门控
        for (node_id, rank) in ranks.iter_mut() {
            if let Some(node) = self.nodes.get(node_id) {
                let mut gate = 1.0;
                
                // 空间门控
                if let NodeType::Location = node.node_type {
                    gate *= spatial_gate;
                }
                
                // 时间门控
                if let NodeType::Time = node.node_type {
                    gate *= temporal_gate;
                }
                
                *rank *= gate;
            }
        }
        
        ranks
    }

    /// 获取超图统计信息
    pub fn statistics(&self) -> HyperGraphStats {
        HyperGraphStats {
            num_nodes: self.nodes.len(),
            num_edges: self.edges.len(),
            avg_edge_size: self.edges.iter().map(|e| e.node_ids.len()).sum::<usize>() as f64 
                / self.edges.len().max(1) as f64,
            max_edge_size: self.edges.iter().map(|e| e.node_ids.len()).max().unwrap_or(0),
            min_edge_size: self.edges.iter().map(|e| e.node_ids.len()).min().unwrap_or(0),
            density: self.calculate_density(),
            is_helly: self.verify_helly_property(),
            is_konig: self.verify_konig_property(),
        }
    }

    fn calculate_density(&self) -> f64 {
        if self.nodes.is_empty() || self.edges.is_empty() {
            return 0.0;
        }
        
        let total_possible_edges = (self.nodes.len() * (self.nodes.len() - 1)) / 2;
        let actual_edges = self.edges.iter()
            .map(|e| e.node_ids.len() * (e.node_ids.len() - 1) / 2)
            .sum::<usize>();
        
        actual_edges as f64 / total_possible_edges.max(1) as f64
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub struct HyperGraphStats {
    pub num_nodes: usize,
    pub num_edges: usize,
    pub avg_edge_size: f64,
    pub max_edge_size: usize,
    pub min_edge_size: usize,
    pub density: f64,
    pub is_helly: bool,
    pub is_konig: bool,
}

/// 超图遍历器（用于查询时的图遍历）
pub struct HyperGraphTraverser {
    graph: HyperGraph,
}

impl HyperGraphTraverser {
    pub fn new(graph: HyperGraph) -> Self {
        Self { graph }
    }

    /// 基于查询的个性化遍历
    pub fn traverse(&self, query: &SearchQuery, max_depth: usize) -> Vec<SearchResult> {
        let mut results = Vec::new();
        let mut visited = HashSet::new();
        let mut queue = VecDeque::new();

        // 从查询文本匹配的节点开始
        let start_nodes = self.find_start_nodes(&query.text);
        for node_id in start_nodes {
            queue.push_back((node_id, 0, 1.0)); // (节点ID, 深度, 初始权重)
        }

        while let Some((current_id, depth, weight)) = queue.pop_front() {
            if depth >= max_depth || visited.contains(&current_id) {
                continue;
            }
            visited.insert(current_id.clone());

            // 获取当前节点关联的记忆
            if let Some(node) = self.graph.nodes.get(&current_id) {
                if let NodeType::Memory = node.node_type {
                    if let Some(memory_id) = node.properties.get("id") {
                        // 这里应该从存储加载完整的Memory
                        // 简化：直接返回节点信息
                        results.push(SearchResult {
                            memory: Memory {
                                id: current_id.clone(),
                                content: node.properties.get("content")
                                    .and_then(|v| v.as_str())
                                    .unwrap_or("")
                                    .to_string(),
                                ..Default::default()
                            },
                            score: weight,
                            ranks: HashMap::new(),
                            matched_nodes: vec![node.clone()],
                            matched_edges: Vec::new(),
                        });
                    }
                }
            }

            // 遍历相邻节点
            if let Some(edge_ids) = self.graph.adjacency.get(&current_id) {
                for edge_id in edge_ids {
                    if let Some(edge) = self.graph.edges.iter().find(|e| e.id == *edge_id) {
                        for neighbor_id in &edge.node_ids {
                            if neighbor_id != &current_id {
                                let edge_weight = edge.weight;
                                let decay = 1.0 / (depth as f64 + 1.0);
                                let new_weight = weight * edge_weight * decay;
                                queue.push_back((neighbor_id.clone(), depth + 1, new_weight));
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 按得分排序
        results.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        results
    }

    fn find_start_nodes(&self, query_text: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {
        let mut nodes = Vec::new();
        
        if let Some(text) = query_text {
            // 简单的文本匹配
            for (node_id, node) in &self.graph.nodes {
                if let Some(content) = node.properties.get("content") {
                    if let Some(content_str) = content.as_str() {
                        if content_str.contains(text) {
                            nodes.push(node_id.clone());
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        nodes
    }
}

/// 超图构建器（从多个来源构建超图）
pub struct HyperGraphBuilder {
    graph: HyperGraph,
}

impl HyperGraphBuilder {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            graph: HyperGraph::new(),
        }
    }

    /// 从记忆列表构建超图
    pub fn from_memories(memories: &[Memory]) -> Self {
        let mut builder = Self::new();
        for memory in memories {
            builder.graph.build_from_memory(memory);
        }
        builder
    }

    /// 添加实体共现关系
    pub fn add_entity_cooccurrence(&mut self, doc_id: &str, entities: &[String]) {
        if entities.len() < 2 {
            return;
        }

        let edge = HyperEdge {
            id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
            node_ids: entities.iter().cloned().collect(),
            edge_type: EdgeType::Cooccurrence,
            weight: 1.0,
            properties: {
                let mut p = HashMap::new();
                p.insert("doc_id".to_string(), serde_json::json!(doc_id));
                p
            },
        };
        self.graph.add_edge(edge).unwrap();
    }

    /// 添加时间序列关系
    pub fn add_temporal_sequence(&mut self, memory_ids: &[&str], timestamps: &[DateTime<Utc>]) {
        if memory_ids.len() != timestamps.len() || memory_ids.is_empty() {
            return;
        }

        let sorted: Vec<_> = memory_ids.iter()
            .zip(timestamps)
            .sorted_by_key(|(_, ts)| *ts)
            .collect();

        for window in sorted.windows(2) {
            let (id1, ts1) = window[0];
            let (id2, ts2) = window[1];
            
            let time_diff = (ts2 - ts1).num_seconds() as f64;
            let weight = 1.0 / (1.0 + time_diff); // 时间越近权重越高

            let edge = HyperEdge {
                id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
                node_ids: vec![id1.to_string(), id2.to_string()],
                edge_type: EdgeType::TemporalOrder,
                weight,
                properties: {
                    let mut p = HashMap::new();
                    p.insert("time_diff_seconds".to_string(), serde_json::json!(time_diff));
                    p
                },
            };
            self.graph.add_edge(edge).unwrap();
        }
    }

    /// 添加空间邻近关系
    pub fn add_spatial_proximity(&mut self, memory_ids: &[&str], locations: &[(f64, f64)]) {
        if memory_ids.len() != locations.len() || memory_ids.is_empty() {
            return;
        }

        for i in 0..memory_ids.len() {
            for j in (i+1)..memory_ids.len() {
                let (lat1, lon1) = locations[i];
                let (lat2, lon2) = locations[j];
                let distance = haversine_distance(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2);
                
                // 距离越近权重越高
                let weight = 1.0 / (1.0 + distance / 1000.0); // 归一化到公里

                let edge = HyperEdge {
                    id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
                    node_ids: vec![memory_ids[i].to_string(), memory_ids[j].to_string()],
                    edge_type: EdgeType::SpatialProximity,
                    weight,
                    properties: {
                        let mut p = HashMap::new();
                        p.insert("distance_meters".to_string(), serde_json::json!(distance));
                        p
                    },
                };
                self.graph.add_edge(edge).unwrap();
            }
        }
    }

    pub fn build(self) -> HyperGraph {
        self.graph
    }
}

// 在 src/extractor.rs 中添加
use std::process::Command;
use std::io::Write;
use tempfile::NamedTempFile;

impl UniversalExtractor {
    /// OCR提取（需安装tesseract）
    pub fn extract_text_from_image(&self, image_path: &Path) -> Result<String> {
        let output = Command::new("tesseract")
            .args([image_path.to_str().unwrap(), "stdout", "-l", "chi_sim+eng"])
            .output()?;
        Ok(String::from_utf8(output.stdout)?)
    }

    /// 音频转文本（需安装whisper）
    pub fn transcribe_audio(&self, audio_path: &Path) -> Result<String> {
        let output = Command::new("whisper")
            .args([audio_path.to_str().unwrap(), "--model", "base", "--language", "zh"])
            .output()?;
        Ok(String::from_utf8(output.stdout)?)
    }

    /// 提取视频关键帧
    pub fn extract_video_frames(&self, video_path: &Path, output_dir: &Path) -> Result<Vec<String>> {
        std::fs::create_dir_all(output_dir)?;
        let output = Command::new("ffmpeg")
            .args([
                "-i", video_path.to_str().unwrap(),
                "-vf", "fps=1",
                output_dir.join("frame_%04d.jpg").to_str().unwrap(),
            ])
            .output()?;
        
        // 读取生成的关键帧
        let frames = std::fs::read_dir(output_dir)?
            .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
            .filter(|e| e.path().extension().map(|s| s == "jpg").unwrap_or(false))
            .map(|e| e.path().to_string_lossy().to_string())
            .collect();
        
        Ok(frames)
    }

    /// 解析GIS文件（需安装gdal）
    pub fn parse_gis_file(&self, gis_path: &Path) -> Result<GisMetadata> {
        // 使用gdal库解析
        // 这里简化返回
        Ok(GisMetadata::default())
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct GisMetadata {
    pub bbox: Option<[f64; 4]>,
    pub crs: Option<String>,
    pub feature_count: usize,
    pub attributes: Vec<String>,
}

impl Storage {
    async fn insert_memory_to_postgres(&self, pool: &PgPool, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        sqlx::query!(
            "INSERT INTO memories (id, content, embedding, spatial, temporal, created_at) 
             VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)",
            memory.id,
            memory.content,
            memory.embedding.as_ref().map(|v| v.as_slice()),
            memory.spatial.as_ref().map(|s| serde_json::to_value(s).unwrap()),
            memory.temporal.as_ref().map(|t| serde_json::to_value(t).unwrap()),
            memory.created_at,
        )
        .execute(pool)
        .await?;
        Ok(())
    }

    async fn index_memory_to_elasticsearch(&self, es: &Elasticsearch, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        let body = json!({
            "content": memory.content,
            "spatial": memory.spatial,
            "temporal": memory.temporal,
            "created_at": memory.created_at,
        });
        
        es.index(IndexDocument::new("memories", &memory.id).body(body))
            .send()
            .await?;
        Ok(())
    }

    async fn insert_hypergraph_to_neo4j(&self, neo4j: &Graph, memory: &Memory) -> Result<()> {
        // 创建Memory节点
        let query = "CREATE (m:Memory {id: $id, content: $content, created_at: $created_at})";
        neo4j.run(query, &mut [("id", memory.id.clone()), 
                               ("content", memory.content.clone()), 
                               ("created_at", memory.created_at.to_rfc3339())]).await?;

        // 创建时空关系
        if let Some(spatial) = &memory.spatial {
            if let (Some(lat), Some(lon)) = (spatial.latitude, spatial.longitude) {
                let query = "CREATE (l:Location {latitude: $lat, longitude: $lon, h3: $h3})
                            CREATE (m)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(l)";
                neo4j.run(query, &mut [
                    ("lat", lat),
                    ("lon", lon),
                    ("h3", spatial.h3_index.clone().unwrap_or_default()),
                ]).await?;
            }
        }

        Ok(())
    }

    async fn bm25_search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        if let Some(es) = &self.elasticsearch {
            let response = es.search(SearchRequest::new("memories")
                .body(json!({
                    "query": {
                        "multi_match": {
                            "query": query.text.as_deref().unwrap_or(""),
                            "fields": ["content^2", "metadata.*"]
                        }
                    },
                    "size": query.top_k
                })))
                .await?;

            // 解析响应
            let hits = response.documents::<Memory>()?;
            Ok(hits.into_iter().map(|doc| SearchResult {
                memory: doc,
                score: 0.0, // ES返回的_score
                ranks: HashMap::new(),
                matched_nodes: Vec::new(),
                matched_edges: Vec::new(),
            }).collect())
        } else {
            Ok(Vec::new())
        }
    }

    async fn vector_search(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        if let Some(pool) = &self.postgres {
            // 使用pgvector进行余弦相似度搜索
            let query_embedding = vec![0.1; 384]; // 实际应从模型生成
            
            let rows = sqlx::query!(
                "SELECT id, content, 1 - (embedding <=> $1) as similarity 
                 FROM memories 
                 ORDER BY embedding <=> $1 
                 LIMIT $2",
                query_embedding.as_slice(),
                query.top_k as i64
            )
            .fetch_all(pool)
            .await?;

            Ok(rows.into_iter().map(|row| SearchResult {
                memory: Memory {
                    id: row.id,
                    content: row.content,
                    ..Default::default()
                },
                score: row.similarity.unwrap_or(0.0) as f64,
                ranks: HashMap::new(),
                matched_nodes: Vec::new(),
                matched_edges: Vec::new(),
            }).collect())
        } else {
            Ok(Vec::new())
        }
    }

    async fn graph_traversal(&self, query: &SearchQuery) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        if let Some(neo4j) = &self.neo4j {
            // 使用Cypher进行超图遍历
            let cypher = r#"
                MATCH (m:Memory)-[r]->(n)
                WHERE m.content CONTAINS $query
                WITH m, collect(r) as relationships, collect(n) as neighbors
                RETURN m, relationships, neighbors
                LIMIT $limit
            "#;
            
            let mut result = neo4j.run(
                cypher, 
                &mut [
                    ("query", query.text.as_deref().unwrap_or("")),
                    ("limit", query.top_k as i64),
                ]
            ).await?;

            // 解析结果
            let mut results = Vec::new();
            while let Some(row) = result.next().await? {
                // 解析Memory节点和关系
                // ...
            }
            Ok(results)
        } else {
            Ok(Vec::new())
        }
    }

    fn fuse_results(
        &self,
        bm25: Vec<SearchResult>,
        vector: Vec<SearchResult>,
        graph: Vec<SearchResult>,
        spatial_temporal: Vec<SearchResult>,
        multimodal: Vec<SearchResult>,
        query: &SearchQuery,
    ) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 实现RRF融合算法
        let mut all_results: HashMap<String, Vec<(String, usize)>> = HashMap::new();
        
        // 收集各路检索的排名
        for (source, results) in [
            ("bm25", bm25),
            ("vector", vector),
            ("graph", graph),
            ("spatial_temporal", spatial_temporal),
            ("multimodal", multimodal),
        ] {
            for (rank, result) in results.into_iter().enumerate() {
                all_results.entry(result.memory.id.clone())
                    .or_default()
                    .push((source.to_string(), rank));
            }
        }

        // RRF融合
        let k = 60.0;
        let mut fused: Vec<SearchResult> = all_results.into_iter()
            .map(|(memory_id, ranks)| {
                let score = ranks.iter()
                    .map(|(source, rank)| {
                        let weight = self.get_source_weight(source);
                        weight / (k + rank as f64)
                    })
                    .sum::<f64>();
                
                // 这里需要从存储加载完整的Memory
                SearchResult {
                    memory: Memory { id: memory_id, ..Default::default() },
                    score,
                    ranks: ranks.into_iter().collect(),
                    matched_nodes: Vec::new(),
                    matched_edges: Vec::new(),
                }
            })
            .collect();

        // 应用时空门控
        if let Some(spatial_filter) = &query.spatial_filter {
            for result in &mut fused {
                if let Some(spatial) = &result.memory.spatial {
                    if let (Some(lat), Some(lon)) = (spatial.latitude, spatial.longitude) {
                        let distance = haversine_distance(
                            spatial_filter.center_lat,
                            spatial_filter.center_lon,
                            lat, lon
                        );
                        let gate = (1.0 - distance / spatial_filter.radius_meters).max(0.0);
                        result.score *= gate;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 时间门控
        if let Some(temporal_filter) = &query.temporal_filter {
            for result in &mut fused {
                if let Some(temporal) = &result.memory.temporal {
                    let ts = temporal.timestamp;
                    let in_range = temporal_filter.start.map(|s| ts >= s).unwrap_or(true)
                        && temporal_filter.end.map(|e| ts <= e).unwrap_or(true);
                    if !in_range {
                        result.score *= 0.1; // 严重降权
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // L2归一化
        let norm: f64 = fused.iter().map(|r| r.score * r.score).sum::<f64>().sqrt().max(1e-9);
        for result in &mut fused {
            result.score /= norm;
        }

        // 排序并截取top_k
        fused.sort_by(|a, b| b.score.partial_cmp(&a.score).unwrap());
        fused.truncate(query.top_k);

        Ok(fused)
    }

    fn get_source_weight(&self, source: &str) -> f64 {
        match source {
            "bm25" => 0.15,
            "vector" => 0.20,
            "graph" => 0.20,
            "spatial_temporal" => 0.15,
            "multimodal" => 0.30,
            _ => 0.0,
        }
    }
}
3. 嵌入模型集成（需创建 src/embedding.rs）
rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::*;
use anyhow::Result;
use ort::{Environment, Session, SessionBuilder};

pub struct EmbeddingModel {
    session: Session,
    model_name: String,
}

impl EmbeddingModel {
    pub fn new(model_path: &str) -> Result<Self> {
        let env = Environment::builder()
            .with_name("hyperrag")
            .build()?;
        
        let session = SessionBuilder::new(&env)?
            .with_model_from_file(model_path)?;
        
        Ok(Self {
            session,
            model_name: model_path.to_string(),
        })
    }

    pub fn embed_text(&self, text: &str) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 预处理：分词、padding等
        let input_tensor = self.preprocess_text(text)?;
        
        // 推理
        let outputs = self.session.run(vec![input_tensor])?;
        let embedding = outputs[0].extract_tensor::<f32>()?;
        
        // 后处理：归一化
        let norm = (embedding.iter().map(|x| x * x).sum::<f32>().sqrt()).max(1e-5);
        let normalized: Vec<f32> = embedding.iter().map(|x| x / norm).collect();
        
        Ok(normalized)
    }

    pub fn embed_image(&self, image_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<f32>> {
        // 图像预处理
        let input_tensor = self.preprocess_image(image_data)?;
        let outputs = self.session.run(vec![input_tensor])?;
        let embedding = outputs[0].extract_tensor::<f32>()?;
        
        let norm = (embedding.iter().map(|x| x * x).sum::<f32>().sqrt()).max(1e-5);
        Ok(embedding.iter().map(|x| x / norm).collect())
    }

    fn preprocess_text(&self, text: &str) -> Result<ort::Value> {
        // 简化：实际应使用tokenizer
        let tokens = text.split_whitespace()
            .take(512)
            .flat_map(|s| s.as_bytes().iter().copied().collect::<Vec<u8>>())
            .collect::<Vec<u8>>();
        
        // 创建伪tensor (实际需要正确的shape和类型)
        let shape = [1, tokens.len()];
        Ok(ort::Value::from_array(
            self.session.allocator()?,
            &[tokens.as_slice()],
            shape,
        )?)
    }

    fn preprocess_image(&self, _image_data: &[u8]) -> Result<ort::Value> {
        // 图像预处理：resize、normalize等
        // 简化实现
        Ok(ort::Value::from_array(
            self.session.allocator()?,
            &[&[0.0f32; 224 * 224 * 3]],
            [1, 3, 224, 224],
        )?)
    }
}

pub mod image;
pub mod audio;
pub mod video;
pub mod gis;

pub trait MultimodalParser {
    type Output;
    fn parse(&self, file_path: &std::path::Path) -> anyhow::Result<Self::Output>;
}

pub struct MultimodalParserFactory;

impl MultimodalParserFactory {
    pub fn create_parser(file_path: &std::path::Path) -> Box<dyn MultimodalParser<Output = MultimodalContent>> {
        let ext = file_path.extension()
            .and_then(|s| s.to_str())
            .map(|s| s.to_lowercase())
            .unwrap_or_default();
        
        match ext.as_str() {
            "jpg" | "jpeg" | "png" | "gif" | "webp" => {
                Box::new(image::ImageParser::new())
            }
            "mp3" | "wav" | "flac" => {
                Box::new(audio::AudioParser::new())
            }
            "mp4" | "avi" | "mov" => {
                Box::new(video::VideoParser::new())
            }
            "tif" | "tiff" | "geotiff" | "shp" | "geojson" => {
                Box::new(gis::GisParser::new())
            }
            _ => {
                Box::new(TextParser) // 默认文本解析
            }
        }
    }
}

struct TextParser;

impl MultimodalParser for TextParser {
    type Output = MultimodalContent;
    
    fn parse(&self, file_path: &std::path::Path) -> anyhow::Result<Self::Output> {
        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file_path)?;
        Ok(MultimodalContent {
            modality: MemoryType::Text,
            data: Some(content.into_bytes()),
            path: Some(file_path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),
            mime_type: Some("text/plain".to_string()),
            metadata: HashMap::new(),
        })
    }
}
src/multimodal/image.rs:

rust

复制代码

查看全部
use crate::models::*;
use anyhow::Result;
use image::{ImageFormat, DynamicImage};

pub struct ImageParser;

impl ImageParser {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self
    }
}

impl super::MultimodalParser for ImageParser {
    type Output = MultimodalContent;
    
    fn parse(&self, file_path: &std::path::Path) -> anyhow::Result<Self::Output> {
        let img = image::open(file_path)?;
        let format = ImageFormat::from_path(file_path)?;
        
        // 提取EXIF等元数据
        let metadata = self.extract_metadata(&img, file_path)?;
        
        // 转换为JPEG字节（统一格式）
        let mut buffer = Vec::new();
        img.write_to(&mut std::io::Cursor::new(&mut buffer), format)?;
        
        Ok(MultimodalContent {
            modality: MemoryType::Image,
            data: Some(buffer),
            path: Some(file_path.to_string_lossy().to_string()),
            mime_type: Some(format.mime_type().to_string()),
            metadata,
        })
    }
    
    fn extract_metadata(&self, img: &DynamicImage, file_path: &std::path::Path) -> anyhow::Result<HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>> {
        let mut metadata = HashMap::new();
        metadata.insert("width".to_string(), json!(img.width()));
        metadata.insert("height".to_string(), json!(img.height()));
        metadata.insert("format".to_string(), json!(file_path.extension().unwrap_or_default()));
        Ok(metadata)
    }
}

use super::*;
use crate::storage::Storage;
use crate::retrieval::RetrievalEngine;
use crate::hypergraph::{HyperGraphBuilder, HyperGraphTraverser};

pub struct EnterpriseEngine {
    storage: Storage,
    retrieval: RetrievalEngine,
    hypergraph: Option<HyperGraph>,
}

impl EnterpriseEngine {
    pub async fn init(config: &super::config::Config) -> anyhow::Result<Self> {
        let storage = Storage::new(config)?;
        let retrieval = RetrievalEngine::new(storage.clone());
        
        // 加载或构建超图
        let hypergraph = Self::build_or_load_hypergraph(&storage).await?;
        
        Ok(Self {
            storage,
            retrieval,
            hypergraph,
        })
    }

    async fn build_or_load_hypergraph(storage: &Storage) -> anyhow::Result<Option<HyperGraph>> {
        // 从存储加载所有记忆并构建超图
        // 简化：返回None，实际应实现
        Ok(None)
    }

    pub async fn query(&self, query: SearchQuery) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
        // 1. 基础检索
        let mut results = self.retrieval.search(query.clone()).await?;
        
        // 2. 超图增强（如果超图已构建）
        if let Some(ref graph) = self.hypergraph {
            let traverser = HyperGraphTraverser::new(graph.clone());
            let graph_results = traverser.traverse(&query, 3);
            
            // 合并结果（加权融合）
            results = self.merge_with_graph_results(results, graph_results);
        }
        
        Ok(results)
    }

    fn merge_with_graph_results(&self, mut base: Vec<SearchResult>, graph: Vec<SearchResult>) -> Vec<SearchResult> {
        let mut score_map: HashMap<String, f64> = base.iter()
            .map(|r| (r.memory.id.clone(), r.score))
            .collect();
        
        for gr in graph {
            let entry = score_map.entry(gr.memory.id.clone()).or_insert(0.0);
            *entry += gr.score * 0.3; // 超图结果权重
        }
        
        base.sort_by(|a, b| {
            score_map.get(&b.memory.id).unwrap().partial_cmp(score_map.get(&a.memory.id).unwrap()).unwrap()
        });
        base
    }
}

融合架构设计
总体架构
text
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     用户输入 / Agent 请求                    │
└─────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    ① 意图分类与路由                          │
│    "为什么" → 因果优先 | "何时" → 时间优先 | "哪里" → 空间优先  │
└─────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              ② 通用信息抽取层（零硬编码）                     │
│  自然语言时间解析 | 离线地名库坐标 | 实体/数字/URL 通用模式识别  │
└─────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                ③ 统一超图存储（四种边类型）                   │
│   ┌──────────┬──────────┬──────────┬──────────┐            │
│   │  语义边  │  时间边  │  因果边  │  实体边  │            │
│   │ (余弦)   │ (序列)   │ (有向)   │ (共现)   │            │
│   └──────────┴──────────┴──────────┴──────────┘            │
│           每条记忆作为超节点，连接四种超边                      │
└─────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         ④ 意图自适应图遍历检索（MAGMA 核心思路）              │
│   根据意图动态选择遍历的边类型与权重，替换固定 RRF 权重          │
└─────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   ⑤ 双流异步处理层                           │
│   ┌─────────────────┐      ┌─────────────────┐             │
│   │   快路径         │      │   慢路径         │             │
│   │ 实时索引/时序更新 │      │ LLM 因果链路推断  │             │
│   │ (不阻塞对话)     │      │ (异步后台运行)   │             │
│   └─────────────────┘      └─────────────────┘             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
关键技术融合点
融合维度	原方案	融入 MAGMA 思路后
记忆表示	单一超图 + 时空属性	统一超图 + 四种边类型（语义/时间/因果/实体）
检索融合	六路固定权重 RRF	意图自适应边遍历权重（为什么→因果，何时→时间，哪里→空间）
推理能力	共现推断	增加因果边 + LLM 异步因果链路推断
处理架构	Kafka 事件驱动	快慢双流分离（Kafka 消费层拆分实时索引与深度推理）
时空处理	H3 空间 + 时间衰减	保留（原方案强项），作为实体边和时间边的增强
五、工程落地路线图
阶段	目标	关键产出	预估时间
Phase 1：意图路由层	在现有检索前增加轻量级意图分类器	基于关键词/LLM prompt 的意图分类模块	1-2周
Phase 2：超图边类型扩展	在 SQLite 超边表中增加 edge_type 字段（语义/时间/因果/实体）	四维超图存储 schema 升级	1周
Phase 3：因果边抽取	在慢路径中增加 LLM 调用，从记忆中推断因果关系	异步因果链路抽取模块	2-3周
Phase 4：自适应权重遍历	根据意图动态计算各边类型的遍历权重	意图 → 边权重映射引擎	1周
Phase 5：端到端集成	完整链路打通 + LoCoMo 风格基准测试	可部署的融合系统 + 评测报告	2周
六、核心代码示例：融合实现骨架
rust
// 意图类型（基于 MAGMA 的四类问题）
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
pub enum QueryIntent {
    Why,      // 因果 → 因果边高权重
    When,     // 时间 → 时间边高权重
    Where,    // 空间 → 空间/实体边高权重
    Who,      // 实体 → 实体边高权重
    What,     // 语义 → 语义边高权重
    Mixed,
}

// 边类型枚举
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub enum HyperedgeType {
    Semantic,   // 语义相似边
    Temporal,   // 时间序列边
    Causal,     // 因果关系边（有向）
    Entity,     // 实体共现边
    Spatial,    // 空间邻近边（保留方案强项）
}

// 超边结构
#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub struct Hyperedge {
    pub id: String,
    pub doc_id: String,
    pub entity_ids: Vec<String>,
    pub edge_type: HyperedgeType,
    pub weight: f32,
    pub direction: Option<bool>, // 因果边需要方向（true = A→B）
}

// 意图自适应边权重计算
pub fn intent_adaptive_edge_weights(intent: &QueryIntent) -> HashMap<HyperedgeType, f32> {
    let mut weights = HashMap::new();
    match intent {
        QueryIntent::Why => {
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Causal, 0.5);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Temporal, 0.2);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Semantic, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Entity, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Spatial, 0.05);
        }
        QueryIntent::When => {
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Temporal, 0.6);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Causal, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Entity, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Spatial, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Semantic, 0.05);
        }
        QueryIntent::Where => {
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Spatial, 0.5);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Entity, 0.25);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Temporal, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Semantic, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Causal, 0.0);
        }
        QueryIntent::Who => {
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Entity, 0.6);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Semantic, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Temporal, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Spatial, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Causal, 0.0);
        }
        QueryIntent::What | QueryIntent::Mixed => {
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Semantic, 0.4);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Entity, 0.25);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Temporal, 0.15);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Spatial, 0.1);
            weights.insert(HyperedgeType::Causal, 0.1);
        }
    }
    // 归一化
    let sum: f32 = weights.values().sum();
    weights.values_mut().for_each(|v| *v /= sum);
    weights
}

// 意图引导的超图遍历检索（替代原 RRF 固定融合）
pub async fn intent_guided_hypergraph_traversal(
    &self,
    query: &SearchQuery,
    intent: &QueryIntent,
    start_entities: &[Entity],
    max_depth: usize,
    top_k: usize,
) -> Result<Vec<Document>> {
    let edge_weights = intent_adaptive_edge_weights(intent);
    let mut visited: HashMap<String, f32> = HashMap::new();
    let mut frontier: VecDeque<(String, f32, usize)> = VecDeque::new();
    
    // 从起始实体出发
    for entity in start_entities {
        frontier.push_back((entity.id.clone(), 1.0, 0));
        visited.insert(entity.id.clone(), 1.0);
    }
    
    // BFS 带边类型权重衰减
    while let Some((node_id, score, depth)) = frontier.pop_front() {
        if depth >= max_depth { continue; }
        
        // 查询从该节点出发的所有超边
        let edges = self.storage.get_outgoing_hyperedges(&node_id)?;
        for edge in edges {
            let edge_weight = edge_weights.get(&edge.edge_type).unwrap_or(&0.1);
            let new_score = score * edge.weight * edge_weight;
            
            for target_id in &edge.entity_ids {
                if target_id == &node_id { continue; }
                let current = visited.get(target_id).unwrap_or(&0.0);
                if new_score > *current {
                    visited.insert(target_id.clone(), new_score);
                    frontier.push_back((target_id.clone(), new_score, depth + 1));
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // 聚合文档得分并返回
    self.aggregate_documents_by_entity_scores(&visited, top_k).await
}
但系统仍有多个模块未实现，特别是存储层和多模态解析器。建议按上述清单逐项完成，即可得到一个完整的时空超图多模态RAG系统。
